3147960.name: Bounty Off Road
3147960.description:
Bounty Off Road is a simulation-focused off-road driving game built around realistic vehicle behavior, tuning, and driver skill. Players take on a wide range of off-road events across an open map, using different vehicle classes that each demand distinct driving techniques. Events are spread throughout the map and tracked on leaderboards, and include most popular styles of off-roading. All vehicles are available from the start, with the challenge coming from mastering the physics and adapting to the environment, not grinding progression. 

Body, Wheel and Tire Customization Including Colors and Sizes

Technical Driving Courses to hone your tuning and driving skills

Vehicle Damage Simulation for Drivetrain and Wheels

  • Simulation-focused off-road driving – Vehicle behavior is grounded in realistic physics, where traction, weight transfer, terrain type, and driver input are key.

  • Multiple vehicle classes – Drive and master distinct classes: UTV, Trail, Mud Mega Truck, Race Mega Truck, Crawler, and Pickup, each with its own handling characteristics.

  • Event-based competition – Take on Mud Bogs, Obstacle Courses, Hill Climbs, Trails, and Rock Crawling challenges spread across the map, with class-specific leaderboards for every event.

  • Deep tuning system – Adjust engine RPM limits, shift points, suspension setup, ignition timing, transmission gearing, turbo or supercharger behavior, and clutch settings to suit different terrains and driving styles.

  • Full vehicle customization – Paint directly onto vehicle bodies using brushes or decals, change wheels and tires, adjust wheel size, and paint wheels independently for functional or aesthetic setups.

  • Solo or online play – Play alone or join sessions with friends or random players, with shared environments and events rather than scripted races.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
